---
title: "Analysis_Attack_Defend_Variance"
author: "Xiaochun Han"
date: "2025-11-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
rm(list = ls())
source("../../utils/functions_library.R")
load_packages(c("dplyr", "caret", "e1071","ggplot2", "pROC", "reshape2", "rstatix","car","readxl"))
```

## Import data
```{r impart data}
setwd('../../Data/Develop')
wd<-getwd()
dataset_BINS <- read.csv('BINS_single_trial_invest.csv',header=TRUE,sep=",")
dataset_INS <- read.csv('INS_single_trial_invest.csv',header=TRUE,sep=",")
dataset_y <- read.csv('win_lose_and_pay_single_trial.csv',header=TRUE,sep=",")
dataset_y_attack <- dataset_y[dataset_y$role.A.1. == 1,]
dataset_y_attack <- dataset_y_attack[-c(4,14,22),] # Three sessions are deleted due to the absent of winning trial(4,22) and brain signal(14). 

INS_mean = extract_win_or_pay_mean(dataset_INS,dataset_y_attack,"WNS_","win",FALSE,FALSE)
BINS_mean = extract_win_or_pay_mean(dataset_BINS,dataset_y_attack,"BNS_","win",FALSE,FALSE)

data_INS_BINS_invest = cbind(INS_mean[,c(1,3:ncol(INS_mean))],BINS_mean[,3:ncol(BINS_mean)])

name = names(data_INS_BINS_invest)
new_names <- gsub("WNS_", "WNC_", name)
new_names <- gsub("BNS_", "BNC_", new_names)
new_names <- gsub("_rTPJ_CH01", "_rTPJ_CH12", new_names)
new_names <- gsub("_rDLPFC_CH02", "_rDLPFC_CH03", new_names)
new_names <- gsub("_rTPJ_CH09", "_rTPJ_CH08", new_names)
new_names <- gsub("_rTPJ_CH03", "_rTPJ_CH09", new_names)
new_names <- gsub("_rTPJ_CH04", "_rTPJ_CH14", new_names)
new_names <- gsub("_rDLPFC_CH06", "_rDLPFC_CH01", new_names)
new_names <- gsub("_rDLPFC_CH05", "_rDLPFC_CH06", new_names)
new_names <- gsub("_rTPJ_CH07", "_rTPJ_CH11", new_names)
new_names <- gsub("_rDLPFC_CH08", "_rDLPFC_CH04", new_names)
new_names <- gsub("_rTPJ_CH10", "_tempholder", new_names)
new_names <- gsub("_rDLPFC_CH11", "_rDLPFC_CH07", new_names)
new_names <- gsub("_rDLPFC_CH12", "_rDLPFC_CH02", new_names)
new_names <- gsub("_rTPJ_CH13", "_rTPJ_CH10", new_names)
new_names <- gsub("_tempholder", "_rTPJ_CH13", new_names)
new_names <- gsub("_rDLPFC_CH14", "_rDLPFC_CH05", new_names)

names(data_INS_BINS_invest) = new_names
```
## Calculate Inter-feature Variance
### All feature
```{r feature variance}
df_feature_attack = data_INS_BINS_invest[, grepl('_Attack_', colnames(data_INS_BINS_invest))]
df_feature_defend = data_INS_BINS_invest[, grepl('_Defend_', colnames(data_INS_BINS_invest))]


attack_cols <- colnames(df_feature_attack)
defend_cols <- colnames(df_feature_defend)

# 创建一个函数来提取变量基名（去除_Attack_或_Defend_部分）
get_base_name <- function(full_name) {
  # 提取_Attack_或_Defend_之前和之后的部分
  if (grepl("_Attack_", full_name)) {
    # 将_Attack_替换为分隔符
    base_part <- sub("_Attack_", "___", full_name)
  } else if (grepl("_Defend_", full_name)) {
    # 将_Defend_替换为分隔符
    base_part <- sub("_Defend_", "___", full_name)
  } else {
    base_part <- full_name
  }
  return(base_part)
}

# 提取所有变量基名
attack_base_names <- sapply(attack_cols, get_base_name)
defend_base_names <- sapply(defend_cols, get_base_name)

# 检查基名是否完全匹配
common_base_names <- intersect(attack_base_names, defend_base_names)
cat("找到", length(common_base_names), "个匹配的变量对\n")

# 创建结果数据框
results <- data.frame(
  Variable = character(),
  Attack_Var_Name = character(),
  Defend_Var_Name = character(),
  Attack_Var_Mean = numeric(),
  Defend_Var_Mean = numeric(),
  Attack_Var_SD = numeric(),
  Defend_Var_SD = numeric(),
  Levene_F = numeric(),
  Levene_p = numeric(),
  Significant = character(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# 设置显著性水平
alpha <- 0.05
p_values <- c()
for (base_name in common_base_names) {
  # 找到对应的完整变量名
  attack_var_name <- attack_cols[attack_base_names == base_name]
  defend_var_name <- defend_cols[defend_base_names == base_name]
  
  # 提取数据
  attack_data <- df_feature_attack[[attack_var_name]]
  defend_data <- df_feature_defend[[defend_var_name]]
  
  # 创建长格式数据
  data_long <- data.frame(
    value = c(attack_data, defend_data),
    group = factor(rep(c("Attack", "Defend"), 
                       c(length(attack_data), length(defend_data))))
  )
  
  # 进行Levene检验
  tryCatch({
    levene_result <- leveneTest(value ~ group, data = data_long)
    
    # 计算描述性统计
    attack_mean <- mean(attack_data, na.rm = TRUE)
    defend_mean <- mean(defend_data, na.rm = TRUE)
    attack_sd <- sd(attack_data, na.rm = TRUE)
    defend_sd <- sd(defend_data, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    # 提取Levene检验结果
    levene_f <- levene_result$`F value`[1]
    levene_p <- levene_result$`Pr(>F)`[1]
    
    # 存储p值用于FDR校正
    p_values <- c(p_values, levene_p)
    
    # 判断是否显著（原始p值）
    significant <- ifelse(levene_p < alpha, "Yes", "No")
    
    # 添加到结果数据框（FDR校正后的p值会在后面添加）
    results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
      Variable = base_name,
      Attack_Var_Name = attack_var_name,
      Defend_Var_Name = defend_var_name,
      Attack_Var_Mean = attack_mean,
      Defend_Var_Mean = defend_mean,
      Attack_Var_SD = attack_sd,
      Defend_Var_SD = defend_sd,
      Levene_F = levene_f,
      Levene_p = levene_p,
      Levene_p_FDR = NA,  # 先设为NA，后面统一计算
      Significant = significant,
      Significant_FDR = NA,  # 先设为NA
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("错误处理变量:", base_name, "-", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
  })
}

# 计算FDR校正后的p值
if (nrow(results) > 0) {
  # 对Levene检验的p值进行FDR校正
  levene_p_fdr <- p.adjust(results$Levene_p, method = "fdr")
  results$Levene_p_FDR <- levene_p_fdr
  
  # 根据FDR校正后的p值判断显著性
  results$Significant_FDR <- ifelse(results$Levene_p_FDR < alpha, "Yes", "No")
}

# 查看结果
cat("\nLevene检验结果汇总:\n")
print(results)
```
### Figures
```{r feature variance}
# Calculate variance ratios
results$Variance_Ratio <- (results$Attack_Var_SD^2) / (results$Defend_Var_SD^2)

# Replace "___" with "_" in variable base names for better display
results$Variable_Display <- gsub("___", "_", results$Variable)

# Sort variables by variance ratio
results <- results[order(results$Variance_Ratio, decreasing = TRUE), ]
results$Variable_Display <- factor(results$Variable_Display, 
                                   levels = results$Variable_Display)

# View results
cat("\nLevene's Test Results Summary:\n")
print(results)

# Create simplified variance ratio plot
p_simple <- ggplot(results, aes(x = Variable_Display, y = Variance_Ratio)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7, fill = "#2E86C1", alpha = 0.8) +
  # Add red reference line at variance ratio = 1
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "solid", color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
  # Simple labels
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "Variance Ratio (Attack/Defend)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5, size = 9),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_blank(),
    plot.subtitle = element_blank(),
    plot.caption = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = unit(c(5, 5, 5, 5), "pt")
  )

# Save the plot
ggsave("variance_ratio_simple.png", plot = p_simple, 
       width = 10, height = 5, 
       dpi = 300, bg = "white")
cat("\nSimple variance ratio plot saved to 'variance_ratio_simple.png'\n")

# Display the plot
print(p_simple)
```


## reorg data
```{r reorg data}
tr <- read_excel('Info_track_coef_JYadded_var.xlsx',sheet="raw_data")
groupSuccess = tr[((tr$roleA1D2 == 1)&(tr$leadL1F2==1)),
                                   c("groupSuccess")]
Var_Attack = tr[((tr$roleA1D2 == 1)&(tr$leadL1F2==1)),
                                   c("Variance")]
Var_Defend = tr[((tr$roleA1D2 == 2)&(tr$leadL1F2==1)),
                                   c("Variance")]


names(Var_Attack) = c("A_Variance")
names(Var_Defend) = c("D_Variance")

df_org_Var = cbind(groupSuccess,Var_Attack,Var_Defend)
df_org_Var_Attack = cbind(groupSuccess,Var_Attack)
df_org_Var_Defend = cbind(groupSuccess,Var_Defend)
```

## Regression
```{r Regress_analysis}
model_list <- list(
model_all <- lm(groupSuccess ~ ., data = df_org_Var),
model_attack <- lm(groupSuccess ~ ., data = df_org_Var_Attack),
model_defend <- lm(groupSuccess ~ ., data = df_org_Var_Defend)
)

R2 <- data.frame(
  Model_Name = c("model_all","model_attack","model_defend"),
  R_squared = numeric(length(model_list)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (i in seq_along(model_list)) {
  model_summary <- summary(model_list[[i]])
  R2$R_squared[i] <- model_summary$r.squared
}

print(R2)
```

## Regression cross-validation
```{r cross_valid}
cv_list <- list(
cv_all = lm_cv_correlation(df_org_Var,5,100,'r_value')
)

Rvalue <- data.frame(
  r_values = sapply(cv_list, function(x) x),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

print(Rvalue)
```

## Permutation cross-validation
```{r permutation, eval=FALSE}
#Attacker-leader
perm_all = lm_perm(df_org_Var,5,5000,'r_value')
```

### Permutation save
```{r perm_save, eval=FALSE}
saveRDS(perm_all, "lm_perm_all_5000_r.RData")
```

### Permutation read
```{r perm_read}
perm_all = readRDS("lm_perm_all_5000_r.RData")
```

### Permutation p value
```{r Summary_R2}
p_perm_list <- list(
  p_perm_all = mean(cv_list$cv_all<perm_all$lm_perm)
)

p_perm <- data.frame(
  p_values = sapply(p_perm_list, function(x) x),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

print(p_perm)
```
